As of December 31, 2025 - 946,243,356 Ordinary Shares were issued and outstanding. This number includes 2,365,608 American Depositary Shares and excludes 372,957,973 dormant ordinary shares. 6, shareholders meeting approved an investment for the total investment amount of $1,500,000 USD. This investment may include related parties. ● Investors will receive approximately 555,555 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) and/or ordinary shares of the Company at a purchase price of $2.70 per ADS. Each ADS represents four hundred (400) ordinary shares, And; ● Series A Warrants: The Company will issue 666,666 Series A Warrants to the investors. The initial exercise price is $2.70 per ADS, which will be permanently reduced to $1.70 per ADS upon the occurrence of a “Series A Trigger Event” (such as the ADS closing price reaching $5.00, a Change of Control/liquidity event exceeding an enterprise/equity value of $150,000,000, or the successful completion of two Phase
